name: Mito-Melt Stack
goal: Boost cellular metabolism and mitochondrial efficiency
why_it_works: MOTS-c and 5-Amino-1MQ hit fat stores from the inside-out by increasing mitochondrial efficiency and altering metabolic gene expression. This is a great stack for stubborn belly fat and metabolic syndrome risk.

name: The Anabolic Growth Stack
goal: Maximize hypertrophy via GH/IGF-1 pathway
why_it_works: GH promotes the release of IGF-1 from the liver, but adding IGF-1 LR3 provides direct action on muscle tissue, enhancing protein synthesis, nutrient partitioning, and recovery speed. CJC + Ipamorelin lays the foundation.
how_to_use: IGF-1 LR3: 20–40 mcg/day post workout (rotate injection sites)

name: The Belly Fat & Insulin Reset Stack
goal: Reduce abdominal weight gain and insulin resistance common in menopause
why_it_works: Attacks belly fat from the inside out: energy metabolism, hormone sensitivity, and fat oxidation all supported here.
how_to_use: MOTS-c: 10 mg/day x 7 days on, 7 off

name: The Brain Fog & Fatigue Fix Stack
goal: Reboot mental clarity, alertness, and mitochondrial drive
why_it_works: Thyroid fog is both mitochondrial and neuroinflammatory. This stack targets both.

name: The CNS Reload Stack
goal: Support neural recovery from EMOMs, AMRAPs, PR attempts
why_it_works: Targets brain and sleep recovery — often neglected in CrossFit.

name: The CNS Reset Stack
goal: Recover faster from heavy lifting-induced CNS fatigue
why_it_works: Supports brain recovery, sleep depth, and systemic repair.

name: The Cognitive & Clarity Stack (Brain Fog Fix)
goal: Restore memory, reduce brain fog, and sharpen verbal flow
why_it_works: Estrogen withdrawal impacts cognition. This stack helps rewire brain plasticity and oxygenation.

name: The Cold Sensitivity & Circulation Stack
goal: Address cold hands/feet and poor thermoregulation
why_it_works: These peptides boost microvascular health, crucial for resolving thyroid-related cold intolerance.

name: The Combat Endurance Stack
goal: Maintain explosiveness into later rounds
why_it_works: Boosts ATP, fat metabolism, and reduces central fatigue.

name: The Estrogen Control Stack
goal: Balance rebound estrogen after cycle cessation
why_it_works: Supports liver detox, gut hormone recycling, and inflammation reduction.

name: The Estrogen Reset Stack
goal: Balance estrogen dominance or deficiency symptoms (mood, belly fat, PMS, breast tenderness)
why_it_works: Kisspeptin gently encourages natural estrogen/progesterone cycling. BPC-157 clears gut-driven estrogen reabsorption. GHK-Cu enhances tissue tone.

name: The Explosive Speed Stack
goal: Increase fast-twitch muscle fiber recruitment and sprint power
why_it_works: IGF-1 DES acts locally on trained muscle; Follistatin inhibits myostatin to allow more growth; GHK-Cu improves oxygen delivery.

name: The Fat-for-Fuel Endurance Stack
goal: Enhance endurance performance through better fat oxidation and glycogen sparing
why_it_works: This stack helps the body tap into fat stores for energy — especially powerful during fasted cardio or long sessions.
how_to_use: MOTS-c: 10 mg/day for 7 days before peak training

name: The Female Fat Loss Stack
goal: Target stubborn estrogen-related fat (hips, thighs, belly)
why_it_works: For perimenopausal or postmenopausal women, this stack helps reduce inflammatory and hormonal drivers of fat gain. Kisspeptin is emerging as a regulatory peptide for fertility and metabolism.
how_to_use: Kisspeptin: 10–20 mcg 2–3x per week (cycle 4 weeks on / 2 off)

name: The Feminine Vitality & Libido Stack
goal: Boost arousal, sensitivity, mood, and connection
why_it_works: PT-141 activates the brain's sexual centers, not hormones. Oxytocin strengthens emotional and physical responsiveness. Selank removes psychological barriers.
how_to_use: PT-141: 0.5–1 mg 30–60 min before intimacy (test low)

name: The Fertility & Cycle Harmony Stack
goal: Regulate ovulation, improve uterine lining, and enhance egg quality
why_it_works: Reproductive health requires a stable HPG axis, balanced immune tolerance, and healthy endometrial environment. This stack covers all.

name: The Fertility Reboot Stack
goal: Restore sperm count and motility post-cycle
why_it_works: hCG maintains spermatogenesis, Kisspeptin restores upstream signaling.

name: The Functional VO2 Stack
goal: Improve CrossFit engine for metcons and rowing
why_it_works: Boosts aerobic ceiling and endurance output.

name: The GH-Boost Metabolic Stack
goal: Torch fat while preserving muscle
why_it_works: CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin synergize to increase natural growth hormone and IGF-1 levels, promoting lipolysis and lean mass retention. AOD-9604, a GH fragment, specifically targets adipose tissue and enhances breakdown of stored fat.
how_to_use: Evening injections for GH stack (CJC + Ipamorelin)
AOD-9604 can be morning or pre-workout

name: The Grip & Pull Stack
goal: Strengthen forearms, tendons, and pulling muscles
why_it_works: Enhances recovery and growth of high-frequency-use muscles.
how_to_use: IGF-1 LR3: 20–40 mcg into biceps or forearms

name: The Hair, Skin & Nail Support Stack
goal: Restore strength, hydration, and turnover in thyroid-depleted tissues
why_it_works: These signs often come from slowed cell turnover. This stack enhances regeneration from root to tip.

name: The Hashimoto's Immune Reset Stack
goal: Reduce TPO antibodies and autoimmune attacks on thyroid tissue
why_it_works: Hashimoto's is a misfiring immune condition. These peptides can down-train the autoimmune loop.

name: The Heavy Squat Stack
goal: Improve quad, glute, and hip drive power
why_it_works: Enhances mitochondrial drive and tissue hypertrophy in target muscle groups.
how_to_use: IGF-1 DES: IM into glutes/quads post-session

name: The Hormone Rhythm Stabilizer Stack
goal: Restore natural hormone cycling and reduce PMS, hot flashes, and mood swings
why_it_works: Helps re-coordinate the hypothalamus-pituitary-ovarian axis and supports immune tolerance that often derails hormone rhythms in perimenopause.

name: The HPTA Reboot Stack
goal: Kickstart hypothalamus-pituitary-testicular axis
why_it_works: Kisspeptin and Gonadorelin stimulate GnRH and LH; GH peptides support anabolic rebound.

name: The Impact Recovery Stack
goal: Heal from bruises, minor sprains, and joint trauma
why_it_works: Reduces inflammation and promotes tissue repair.

name: The Joint & Bone Support Stack
goal: Prevent joint degeneration and loss of bone density post-estrogen
why_it_works: Estrogen protects joints and bones — this stack mimics that protection during decline and loss.

name: The Knockout Sleep Stack
goal: Deepen sleep to improve fight-night recovery
why_it_works: Targets thalamus, sleep hormones, and nervous system tone.

name: The Lean Mass Builder (Recomp Stack)
goal: Build lean muscle while staying shredded
why_it_works: Tesamorelin helps shift body comp toward lean tissue, while 5-Amino-1MQ increases NAD+ and muscle metabolism. This is a clean bulk or recomp stack, with minimal water retention or fat gain.

name: The Lean & Toned Stack for Women
goal: Burn fat while preserving curves and muscle
why_it_works: GH-based peptides can benefit women if dosed smartly — this stack keeps it safe, with minimal androgenic risk.

name: The Leydig Cell Support Stack
goal: Protect testicular cells from oxidative damage
why_it_works: Reduces inflammation, improves mitochondrial function in Leydig tissue.

name: The LH & FSH Recovery Stack
goal: Normalize LH/FSH levels and restore testicular function
why_it_works: Mimics physiologic LH/FSH pulses and testicular stimulation.

name: The Libido & Connection Revival Stack
goal: Restore sexual desire, intimacy sensitivity, and emotional bonding
why_it_works: This addresses both the neurobiological and emotional dimensions of low libido — ideal for re-establishing connection and body trust.
how_to_use: PT-141: 0.5–1 mg subQ 30–60 min before intimacy

name: The Metabolic Drag Reversal Stack
goal: Boost metabolism, fat burning, and thyroid-related thermogenesis
why_it_works: Thyroid controls metabolic rate — these peptides mimic and support that thermogenic drive.

name: The Mobility & Joint Stack
goal: Keep shoulders, knees, and wrists mobile under high volume
why_it_works: Supports cartilage and synovial membrane health.

name: The mTOR Activation Stack
goal: Activate muscle-building pathways on a cellular level
why_it_works: Follistatin blocks myostatin, which limits how much muscle you can build. Pairing with IGF-1 DES (shorter half-life, localized action) post-workout creates a hyper-anabolic microenvironment. Epitalon can extend the window of regeneration over time.
how_to_use: IGF-1 DES: 20–40 mcg IM, immediately post-training in muscle group worked

name: The PCOS & Metabolic Stack
goal: Improve insulin sensitivity, ovulation, and reduce androgen symptoms
why_it_works: This combo improves energy regulation, reduces insulin resistance, and supports hormonal harmony — ideal for PCOS body types.

name: The Perimenopause Balancer Stack
goal: Ease mood swings, hot flashes, sleep disruption, and weight changes
why_it_works: This stack supports the fading circadian and hormonal rhythms that drive perimenopausal chaos — without synthetic hormone therapy.
how_to_use: Selank: 300 mcg intranasal daily or as needed

name: The Post-Orchitis Testicular Recovery Stack
goal: Heal inflammation or trauma post-cycle
why_it_works: Accelerates tissue healing and restores microvascular integrity.
how_to_use: BPC-157: 500 mcg/day near testicles (subQ or systemic)

name: The Raw Power Stack
goal: Build maximal strength via GH and androgenic synergy
why_it_works: GH and IGF-1 increase contractile tissue, Kisspeptin supports T output.

name: The Reaction Speed & Reflex Stack
goal: Improve reflexes, twitch response, and mental clarity
why_it_works: Enhances neuroplasticity, synapse firing, and visual-motor tracking.

name: The Recovery & Repair Stack
goal: Rebuild faster, reduce soreness, recover tendons and muscle fibers
why_it_works: This is the stack for injured lifters, overtrained athletes, or older individuals. BPC-157 and TB-500 work systemically to repair microtrauma, while GHK-Cu restores connective tissue and boosts satellite cell recruitment.

name: The Semen Volume Stack
goal: Boost seminal fluid and prostate support
why_it_works: hCG maintains seminal gland activity; BPC-157 supports prostate healing.

name: The Shred Stack
goal: Accelerate fat loss while preserving lean muscle
why_it_works: Enhances fat oxidation, mitochondrial activity, NAD+ support, and lipolysis — a modern metabolic peptide blend.

name: The Skin & Collagen Rescue Stack
goal: Reduce skin thinning, dryness, and fine lines caused by estrogen drop
why_it_works: These peptides support fibroblast activity, vascular tone, and skin regeneration that estrogen normally maintains.
how_to_use: GHK-Cu: 100–200 mcg/day topical or subQ to affected areas

name: The Skin, Hair & Glow Stack
goal: Improve collagen, reduce fine lines, regrow hair, enhance complexion
why_it_works: Beauty starts with repair. These peptides support collagen, skin hydration, and hair vitality — all from the inside out.

name: The Sleep & Emotional Reset Stack
goal: Improve sleep quality, calm anxiety, and support mood stability
why_it_works: Hormonal shifts in menopause disrupt GABA, oxytocin, and sleep neurochemistry. This trio helps recalibrate without drugs.

Oxytocin: 10 IU intranasal during emotional dysregulation

name: The Spartan Stack
goal: Build strength, power, and recovery capacity
